name: Solid Woven Border Rug - Threshold™
description:
Give your home decor a touch of simple and sophisticated style with this Solid Woven Border Rug from Threshold™. This indoor area rug, made using a jute blend, is easy to clean and maintain thanks to its flat pile height, so you can place it in high-traffic areas like your den or entryway. The neutral hues make it blend easily with any existing decor, and the latex backing helps prevent sliding to keep the rug firmly in place.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
